tvShow.name: A Shop for Killers
tvShow.overview: A niece who lost her parents and grew up in the hands of an uncle who runs a shopping mall faces a new truth after her uncle's sudden death.

episodes.name: Murthehelp
episodes.overview: Jian, who is helplessly attacked in her own home, dodges the flying bullets.

episodes.name: Jeong Jinman, Jeong Jinman, Jeong Jinman
episodes.overview: Jinman receives an unexpected call. Jian, who is alone at home, is pursued by unidentified men.

episodes.name: The Strong Don't Howl
episodes.overview: Jian finds herself in danger as she searches for a rescue phone in the mountains to save Jinman.

episodes.name: The Shopping Mall
episodes.overview: Jian and Jeongmin flee from the killers and meet Brother in the underground shopping mall.

episodes.name: Babylon
episodes.overview: Jian gets angry as she watches Jinman on the screen, and Jeongmin points a gun at Jian's head.

episodes.name: Jeong Jinman
episodes.overview: Jinman, who was once a mercenary of a large company, Babylon, suffers from the truth he learns.

episodes.name: Trap
episodes.overview: Bale, who was presumed to be dead, begins his revenge, and Jinman fights back to protect Jian.

episodes.name: Listen Up, Jian
episodes.overview: Killers close in on Jinman's house. Jian prepares for the final duel on her own.

seasons.name: Season 1
seasons.overview: After the sudden death of Jian's uncle, she learns of a suspicious shopping mall that he left behind. Who was her uncle, and what kind of shopping mall did he run? Before Jian can even fathom what is going on, she is attacked by unidentified people who are after her uncle's supplies.

episodes.name: Jinman, That Same Day
episodes.overview: Jinman returns and the truth behind the day he faked his death begins to emerge.

episodes.name: Recluse
episodes.overview: A new adversary appears, disrupting the balance and challenging the murthehelp team.

seasons.name: Season 2
seasons.overview: Season 2 returns with Jian in control of the weapons shop, Jinman returned from the dead, and BABYLON well and truly on the backfoot. Working to keep Jian safe, Jinman will take the fight to BABYLON's door, but the mercenary organization won't go down easily. Humiliated, BABYLON will bring in help from overseas and unleash a new wave of deadly assassins to rebuild their ranks and exact their revenge.

alternativeTitles.title: လူသတ်သမားတွေရဲ့ ဆိုင်

reviews.author: MovieGuys
reviews.content:
A shop for Killers offers up an interesting take on the assassin genre. 

A main character who inherits a dark web weapons shop from her uncle for assassins and mercenaries, is an interesting premise. It builds well, with the main character discovering how much genetic commonality, she shares, with her presumably deceased, ex-mercenary uncle. 

What lets this series down somewhat are the absurdly unrealistic fight scenes, be they armed or unarmed,not to mention the constant switching between past,present and different aspects of the story. It makes the overriding tale difficult to follow and tends to defuse, mounting tension and excitement.  

In summary, a novel idea with a complex interesting story and characterisations. Let down somewhat by implausible fight scenes and a failure to focus consistently, on the main story line.
